message:
fix(build): Link libgcc_s for GCC compiler runtime builtins

WAMR AOT libraries built with GCC reference compiler runtime builtins
(__addvdi3, __mulvdi3) and C++ standard library symbols that aren't
provided by Zig's compiler-rt or stdc++ alone.

Adding libgcc_s provides the missing GCC runtime symbols needed to
link GCC-compiled static libraries with Zig's ld.lld linker.
